description: This body hugging t-shirt from adidas is a quintessential gym t-shirt, which would make you feel comfortable and dry even during your hectic work out schedules. In case you are not comfortable with wearing a sleeveless T-shirt, you always have the option of wearing it underneath an unbuttoned white casual shirt.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
